headline: Super Micro Faces Export Probes As AI Server Growth Story Tested
summary: US and Taiwanese authorities are investigating alleged export-control and chip-smuggling violations tied to Super Micro Computer's Nvidia-based servers. A recent US Department of Justice indictment names individuals reportedly connected to Super Micro Computer's technology supply chain, while the company itself is not a defendant. Super Micro Computer has said it is cooperating with authorities and tightening compliance processes to reduce the risk of its hardware being diverted to...
